CustomField.description: Check to manually send the "SECOND REQUEST Additional Information/Documents Requested by..." reminder email. Make sure to update the "Document Request Due" and "Document Request Due Time" fields before checking.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Check to manually send the "SECOND REQUEST Additional Information/Documents Requested by..." reminder email. Make sure to update the "Document Request Due" and "Document Request Due Time" fields before checking.
CustomField.label: Send 2nd Document Corrections Reminder
